# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source qualifies as an institute-worthy empirical research preprint.

## Why

The excerpt presents a work-in-progress academic manuscript with a defined dataset, sampling method, and reported results on adoption, structure, and evolution of AI configuration files across 466 open-source software projects. That is real empirical substance, not generic commentary or architecture description.

## Limits
